kpis.niche: AI tools / Claude / SaaS-AI / French-speaking AI
kpis.gapIdentified: Chief AI Officer / C-Suite AI leadership (zero competitors)

iceTips.action: Create a 'Chief AI Officer' positioning as the executive alternative to tool reviews
iceTips.reasoning: Every competitor targets builders/solopreneurs. Zero address C-suite AI leadership. Gareth's CAIO angle is a wide-open niche with enterprise LTV.

iceTips.action: Use contrarian/hype title patterns: 'Don't X', 'Y sucks, actually'
iceTips.reasoning: Contrarian titles produce the highest outlier rates. 'Don't Start An AI Agency' got 16.9x, 'Clawdbot Sucks, Actually' got 5.42x.

iceTips.action: Include money/revenue figures in titles and thumbnails
iceTips.reasoning: Videos with monetary claims ('$2.6M agency', '$5K automation') consistently outperform. Income/money title pattern drives clicks.

iceTips.action: Create a comprehensive Claude Code course (2-4 hours)
iceTips.reasoning: nicksaraev's 4-hour Claude Code course got 1.28M views (31.56x outlier). Long-form courses are the #1 outlier format in this niche.

iceTips.action: Position CAIO Academy as the executive/strategic AI channel
iceTips.reasoning: All competitors target developers and solopreneurs. Zero channels address C-suite AI leadership. This is a wide open gap.

iceTips.action: Create tool comparison videos (X vs Y format)
iceTips.reasoning: 'Make vs n8n' got 10.89x outlier ratio. Comparison content drives search traffic and high engagement.

iceTips.action: Use numbered listicles for discovery content: '5 Ways...', '7 Tools...'
iceTips.reasoning: Listicle/Best-of pattern averages well across channels. AILABS '5 Ways To Build Websites' got 4.51x outlier ratio.

iceTips.action: Publish 'complete guide' content for trending AI tools
iceTips.reasoning: Comprehensive tutorials on specific tools (OpenClaw, Claude Code) consistently outperform. AlexFinn's OpenClaw tutorial got 367K views.

iceTips.action: Build 'AI for Business Leaders' series distinct from technical tutorials
iceTips.reasoning: No competitor addresses non-technical executives. CAIO's Chief AI Officer positioning is uniquely suited for this underserved audience.

iceTips.action: Optimize video length: 10-22 minutes for tutorials, 1-4 hours for courses
iceTips.reasoning: Two distinct sweet spots emerge: short punchy tutorials (10-15 min) for regular content, marathon courses (1-4 hrs) for tentpole content.
Channels with higher posting frequency have more total outliers and faster growth.

iceTips.action: React to major AI announcements within 48 hours
iceTips.reasoning: News/update content gets initial traffic spikes. Docker release video (AILABS) got 6.19x as an outlier by being early.
yassine-sdiri and SamouraiDansant show strong French AI audience. CAIO could capture both markets.

iceTips.action: Create a 'CAIO Certification Roadmap' video series
iceTips.reasoning: yassine-sdiri's 'Formation IA' video got 515K views - the #2 outlier overall. Structured education content has massive demand.

winning_patterns: Dark background with single bright contrast color (orange/green/yellow)
Large face with strong expression (surprise, tension, concentration) occupying 1/3 of frame
Three- to four-word sans-serif overlay, readable on phone
Contextual prop (code screenshot for build, graph for analysis, tool logo for comparison)
CAIO Academy: black-and-white, serif title, restraint. Stands out visually against loud tool-tutorial thumbnails.
losing_patterns: Busy collages with multiple AI tool logos
Arrow-to-face shock memes (overdone in the niche)
All-caps yellow text on red (Mr Beast style works less for C-level)

winning_structures.name: The Nuclear Number
winning_structures.description: Open with a specific dollar/percent/view figure that seems too big to be real.
winning_structures.example: "$285 billion. Vanished in a week. Not a general crash. Surgical." — SamouraiDansant

winning_structures.name: The Mythos Break
winning_structures.description: Name the official narrative. Declare it false. Promise the real mechanism.
winning_structures.example: "Apple has just been brought to its knees... or at least, that's what they want you to believe."

winning_structures.name: The Contrarian Prescription
winning_structures.description: Tell the viewer NOT to do the thing everyone is telling them to do.
winning_structures.example: "Don't Start An AI Agency (Do This Instead)" — StephenGPope, 16.9x outlier

winning_structures.name: The Live Build Promise
winning_structures.description: State the outcome and the time. Show the final result in 3 seconds. Transition.
winning_structures.example: "I built this in 2 hours. Here is the code." — nateherk/nicksaraev pattern

winning_structures.name: The Philosophical Meta
winning_structures.description: State a counter-intuitive principle. Then systematically unfold it.
winning_structures.example: "The real obstacle to your progress in AI is not the technique." — SamouraiDansant

avoid: Generic "today we're going to look at" openers
Tool-first framing ("In this video I'll show you ChatGPT prompts...")
